top_signals.title: Oil prices edge higher after report of Iranian attack on commercial ships in Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Brent and U.S. crude futures rose after a report of an Iranian attack on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Amazon Seeks to Raise at Least $25 Billion From Bond Sale
top_signals.summary: Amazon.com Inc. is looking to raise at least $25 billion from a US dollar bond sale, its latest funding push as the company ramps up investment in artificial intelligence infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Accounting Firm CBIZ Urged by Activist Investor to Pursue M&A
top_signals.summary: A CBIZ Inc. shareholder is urging the accounting firm to re-evaluate its capital allocation, abandon a share buyback plan and return to pursuing acquisitions, according to a letter sent to the company.

top_signals.title: French far-right leader Le Pen cleared to stand for president
top_signals.summary: Appeals court upholds her conviction for embezzlement but shortens her sentence

top_signals.title: Trump Accounts, the Dow's latest record, Microsoft layoffs and more in Morning Squawk
top_signals.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

top_signals.title: England 2am World Cup victory smashes records for BBC on iPlayer and website
top_signals.summary: England’s dramatic World Cup victory against Mexico led to a record-breaking broadcast across the board for the BBC. Over 11m BBC iPlayer requests contributed to the largest ever day on record for the streaming service, hitting 48m requests in total on Monday, while the 3-2 win at the Estadio Azteca attracted a peak live audience [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Major medical device manufacturer notifies nearly 4 million of breach
top_signals.summary: Information like Social Security numbers and health-related data was accessed, but the company said it had “no evidence that impacted information has been publicly posted or exposed on the internet.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
